description.full:
Bamboo forest rain ambience with Japanese koto music вЂ” designed for studying, deep work, and focus sessions lasting 2 to 8 hours.

You are sitting on a traditional Japanese engawa porch, looking out into a dense bamboo grove on a soft, overcast afternoon. Light rain falls steadily through the bamboo canopy. Occasional drips from the eave, gentle bamboo creaks in the wind, and a distant temple bell mark the passing of time. The koto plays sparse, unhurried phrases in D Dorian вЂ” never repeating, never demanding attention.

This track is loop-safe and designed for seamless all-day playback.

Best experienced at low to medium volume with headphones or speakers. The koto is mixed as a gentle anchor вЂ” let it recede into the background while you work. The rain layer is always present; the random sounds (crow, bamboo, bell) appear every few minutes to keep the scene alive without drawing attention.

description.first_3_lines:
Bamboo forest rain ambience with Japanese koto music вЂ” designed for studying, deep work, and focus sessions lasting 2 to 8 hours.

You are sitting on a traditional Japanese engawa porch, looking out into a dense bamboo grove on a soft, overcast afternoon.
description.description_notes: First 3 lines appear before 'Show more' вЂ” they contain the primary keyword cluster and a scene-setting hook. Hashtags at bottom only (not mixed into body).

tag_notes.placement_rule: Most important tags first вЂ” YouTube weights earlier tags more heavily

text_options.style_note: White text on dark green/grey scene. Large bold main line, smaller sub line below.
Minimal. Split across two lines. No extra labels.
Single power word. Contrast style вЂ” strong visual impact in feed.

thumbnail.thumbnail_notes: The Midjourney scene (engawa porch + bamboo + rain) is naturally cinematic and dark вЂ” white or very light text will read well. Avoid yellow or orange tones that conflict with the green-grey colour palette. No clock/timer icon needed вЂ” the hour count in the sub_line is sufficient.
